description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On July 29, 2025 at 4:59 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a collision 
involving a passenger car on 11th Street near Mission Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northwestbound on 11th Street in the second to the right lane when it proceeded to change lanes into the 
right turn lane behind a queue of traffic stopped for the intersection at Mission Street. While the Waymo AV was changing lanes, a 
passenger car that was initially stopped in front of the Waymo AV facing northwest in the second to the right lane began to reverse. The 
Waymo AV came to a stop in the queue of traffic with its rear left side still partially in the second to right lane. The passenger car continued 
to reverse and the rear right side of the passenger car made contact with the rear left side of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the 
impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
